title: Project Manager (Bids & Proposal)
description:
The Opportunity:

  • Bid/ Capture leader role, covering in priority strategic/ complex Security bids opportunities ranging from > 30 Million SGD
  • Defining and implementing specific bid tools/ processes
  • Enforce Thales bid process (Gates, reviews)
  • Negotiations and clarification sessions with the Customer


Responsibilities:

  • Drive the end-to-end management of complex bids, preferably in large-scale solution and system integration opportunities
  • Ensure a consistent bid management process across all bids using established bid management tools
  • Understand client’s RFP/tender objective, customer’s pain points and Thales’ competitive advantage
  • Work closely with different internal stakeholders to develop a winning proposal, aligning customer’s needs and Thales’ solutions
  • Manage communications between internal stakeholders and customers on matters pertaining to the bid (e.g. tender clarifications, corrigendum, cost + price review, etc)
  • Manage the creation of the bid deliverables and ensuring review and governance, leading to the creation of a high quality proposal
  • Assist Sales/ BD forces in Qualifying Opportunities
  • Actively participate in defining and then implementing winning strategies and capture plans
  • Manage Bid Budget spending by bid resources and support functions


Requirements:

  • Good degree in Engineering/Business with at least 5 years of experience preferably in Security or Defence sector
  • Result oriented, strong drive in a team context
  • Technical background with strong inclination for commercial exposure
  • High level of attention to details
  • Excellent Communication and Negotiation skills
  • Demonstrated international exposure
  • Proficient in written and spoken English
  • Experience with Strategic long cycle selling and dealing with public procurement processes
  • Dealing with complex global matrix organization

postedCompany.description:
Thales Group

Everywhere it matters, Thales is there. In all its markets — aerospace, space, ground transportation, defence and security, and digital security  — our solutions help customers to make the right decisions at the right time and act accordingly.


The combined expertise of our 80,000 employees, world-class technology, and operations in 68 countries have made Thales a key player in keeping the public safe and secure, guarding vital infrastructure and protecting the national security interests of countries around the globe.


Thales Solutions Asia

Thales people architect solutions that enable two-thirds of planes to take off and land safely. We create in-flight entertainment systems that engross 50 million fliers every year and we develop the avionics that control the world’s largest commercial aircrafts. Our simulators train the next generation of pilots for fighter jets, transporters and search and rescue helicopters. And, together, each and every member of our aerospace team makes a difference.


Thales established its presence in Singapore in 1973 to support the expansion of aerospace-related activities in the Asia-Pacific region. Throughout the last four decades, the company grew from strength to strength and is today involved in the primary businesses of Aerospace (including Air Traffic Management), Defence & Security, Ground Transportation and Digital Identity & Security. Thales today employs over 2,100 people in Singapore across all its business areas.
postedCompany.name: THALES SOLUTIONS ASIA PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
